caveats: Portfolio Demo uses a cached CFS demo extract.
CFS Economics is screening-level context, not a formal appraisal or tax bill.
Opportunity classes are review bands, not approval recommendations.

data_readiness.gap_or_next_need: Add current appraisal extract if missing.
Add official utility, school, and transportation service assumptions.

kpis.caveat: Parcel count with economics screening context.
kpis.label: Parcels analyzed

kpis.caveat: High land value plus low improvement-to-land ratio.
kpis.label: Underbuilt candidates

kpis.caveat: Low current value per acre with enough acreage for review.
kpis.label: Tax-base opportunity signals

kpis.caveat: Records missing key value or acreage fields.
kpis.label: Economic data needed

caveats: This is not an approval recommendation or official fiscal impact study.
scenario_templates.title: Current Conditions
scenario_templates.what_it_tests: Shows current value, acreage, constraints, and data confidence before scenario assumptions.

caveats: This is not an approval recommendation or official fiscal impact study.
scenario_templates.title: Growth Continues As-Is
scenario_templates.what_it_tests: Tests whether current observed permit pressure reinforces existing fiscal/service tradeoffs.

caveats: This is not an approval recommendation or official fiscal impact study.
scenario_templates.title: Infrastructure-Constrained Growth
scenario_templates.what_it_tests: Tests where tax-base opportunity may be limited by utility, school, floodplain, or transportation burden.

caveats: This is not an approval recommendation or official fiscal impact study.
scenario_templates.title: Targeted Investment Scenario
scenario_templates.what_it_tests: Tests whether infrastructure investment could unlock future value in underbuilt or corridor parcels.

caveats: This is not an approval recommendation or official fiscal impact study.
scenario_templates.title: Higher-Density Redevelopment Scenario
scenario_templates.what_it_tests: Tests modeled tax-base lift against public cost risk under redevelopment assumptions.

caveats: This is not an approval recommendation or official fiscal impact study.
scenario_templates.title: Employment / Industrial Scenario
scenario_templates.what_it_tests: Tests employment land opportunity against road access, flood exposure, and service readiness.

caveats: This is not an approval recommendation or official fiscal impact study.
scenario_templates.title: Mixed-Use Corridor Scenario
scenario_templates.what_it_tests: Tests corridor investment readiness and market + planning alignment.
